description: You are a sustainability consultant hired by a beverage company to compare the environmental impact of two packaging alternatives: glass bottles and aluminum cans. Using openLCA, the US Life Cycle Inventory (USLCI) database (~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip), and the LCIA methods (~/LCA_Imports/lcia_methods.zip), conduct a comparative life cycle assessment. Export a CSV file to ~/LCA_Results/packaging_comparison.csv showing the environmental impact scores for both manufacturing processes. The report must include Global Warming Potential and at least two additional impact categories. Format the CSV so each row represents one packaging option, with columns for each impact category's calculated value.
